expectations.text: Review includes a complexity/split advisory for the large 75+ file scope
expectations.evidence: No [!NOTE] Complexity advisory block. The single-project-directory exemption in the complexity reference suppressed it. Formatting-mixed-with-logic is mentioned in Suggestions but not as a formal advisory.
Summary: 'preserved in place with @deprecated JSDoc and UmbDeprecation runtime warnings'

expectations.text: Checks frontend-specific breaking changes (exports, custom elements) not just backend
expectations.evidence: Critical section flags alias renames; Affected implementations explains plugin impact

expectations.text: Findings reference specific files with line numbers
expectations.evidence: All findings have file paths (e.g., manifests.ts, document-create-options-modal.element.ts:178)

expectations.text: Properly deprecated code is NOT flagged as Critical breaking change
expectations.evidence: Only alias renames (which lack deprecation) are Critical; deprecated modals noted as correctly handled

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings are functional: alias renames, hardcoded ellipsis UX, cancelled modal error handling

expectations.text: Alias renames (CreateOptions → Create) flagged as Critical breaking change
expectations.evidence: Critical section explicitly flags both alias renames with fix suggestion

expectations.text: Deleted action classes NOT flagged as breaking (verified against package.json exports)
expectations.evidence: No mention of deleted classes as breaking; only alias renames flagged

expectations.text: Flags UiBaseLocators.ts as formatting changes mixed with functional changes
expectations.evidence: Suggestions section: 'bulk of this 1065-line change is a quote-style reformatting mixed with real locator logic updates'

expectations.text: Does not review noise files (generated files, lock files, etc.)
expectations.evidence: 'Skipped: 0 noise files out of 78 total' — correctly checked, none found
